tools.description: Create a new Word document with optional metadata.
tools.name: create_document
tools.title: Create Word Document

tools.description: Create a copy of a Word document.
tools.name: copy_document
tools.title: Copy Word Document

tools.description: Get information about a Word document.
tools.name: get_document_info
tools.title: Get Document Info

tools.description: Extract all text from a Word document.
tools.name: get_document_text
tools.title: Get Document Text

tools.description: Get the structure of a Word document.
tools.name: get_document_outline
tools.title: Get Document Outline

tools.description: List all .docx files in the specified directory.
tools.name: list_available_documents
tools.title: List Available Documents

tools.description: Get the raw XML structure of a Word document.
tools.name: get_document_xml
tools.title: Get Document XML

tools.description: Insert a header (with specified style) before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), header_title (str), position ('before' or 'after'), header_style (str, default 'Heading 1'), target_paragraph_index (int, optional).
tools.name: insert_header_near_text
tools.title: Insert Header Near Text

tools.description: Insert a new line or paragraph (with specified or matched style) before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), line_text (str), position ('before' or 'after'), line_style (str, optional), target_paragraph_index (int, optional).
tools.name: insert_line_or_paragraph_near_text
tools.title: Insert Line Near Text

tools.description: Insert a bulleted or numbered list before or after the target paragraph. Specify by text or paragraph index. Args: filename (str), target_text (str, optional), list_items (list of str), position ('before' or 'after'), target_paragraph_index (int, optional), bullet_type ('bullet' for bullets or 'number' for numbered lists, default: 'bullet').
tools.name: insert_numbered_list_near_text
tools.title: Insert List Near Text

tools.description: Add a paragraph to a Word document with optional formatting.
tools.name: add_paragraph
tools.title: Add Paragraph

tools.description: Add a heading to a Word document with optional formatting.
tools.name: add_heading
tools.title: Add Heading

tools.description: Add an image to a Word document.
tools.name: add_picture
tools.title: Add Picture

tools.description: Add a table to a Word document.
tools.name: add_table
tools.title: Add Table

tools.description: Add a page break to the document.
tools.name: add_page_break
tools.title: Add Page Break

tools.description: Delete a paragraph from a document.
tools.name: delete_paragraph
tools.title: Delete Paragraph

tools.description: Search for text and replace all occurrences.
tools.name: search_and_replace
tools.title: Search and Replace

tools.description: Create a custom style in the document.
tools.name: create_custom_style
tools.title: Create Custom Style

tools.description: Format a specific range of text within a paragraph.
tools.name: format_text
tools.title: Format Text

tools.description: Format a table with borders, shading, and structure.
tools.name: format_table
tools.title: Format Table

tools.description: Apply shading/filling to a specific table cell.
tools.name: set_table_cell_shading
tools.title: Set Table Cell Shading

tools.description: Apply alternating row colors to a table for better readability.
tools.name: apply_table_alternating_rows
tools.title: Apply Alternating Row Colors

tools.description: Apply special highlighting to table header row.
tools.name: highlight_table_header
tools.title: Highlight Table Header

tools.description: Merge cells in a rectangular area of a table.
tools.name: merge_table_cells
tools.title: Merge Table Cells

tools.description: Merge cells horizontally in a single row.
tools.name: merge_table_cells_horizontal
tools.title: Merge Cells Horizontally

tools.description: Merge cells vertically in a single column.
tools.name: merge_table_cells_vertical
tools.title: Merge Cells Vertically

tools.description: Set text alignment for a specific table cell.
tools.name: set_table_cell_alignment
tools.title: Set Cell Alignment

tools.description: Set text alignment for all cells in a table.
tools.name: set_table_alignment_all
tools.title: Set Table Alignment

tools.description: Add password protection to a Word document.
tools.name: protect_document
tools.title: Protect Document

tools.description: Remove password protection from a Word document.
tools.name: unprotect_document
tools.title: Unprotect Document

tools.description: Add a footnote to a specific paragraph in a Word document.
tools.name: add_footnote_to_document
tools.title: Add Footnote

tools.description:
Add a footnote after specific text with proper superscript formatting.
This enhanced function ensures footnotes display correctly as superscript.
tools.name: add_footnote_after_text
tools.title: Add Footnote After Text

tools.description:
Add a footnote before specific text with proper superscript formatting.
This enhanced function ensures footnotes display correctly as superscript.
tools.name: add_footnote_before_text
tools.title: Add Footnote Before Text

tools.description:
Enhanced footnote addition with guaranteed superscript formatting.
Adds footnote at the end of a specific paragraph with proper style handling.
tools.name: add_footnote_enhanced
tools.title: Add Footnote Enhanced

tools.description: Add an endnote to a specific paragraph in a Word document.
tools.name: add_endnote_to_document
tools.title: Add Endnote

tools.description: Customize footnote numbering and formatting in a Word document.
tools.name: customize_footnote_style
tools.title: Customize Footnote Style

tools.description:
Delete a footnote from a Word document.
Identify the footnote either by ID (1, 2, 3, etc.) or by searching for text near it.
tools.name: delete_footnote_from_document
tools.title: Delete Footnote

tools.description:
Add footnote with robust validation and Word compliance.
This is the production-ready version with comprehensive error handling.
tools.name: add_footnote_robust
tools.title: Add Footnote Robust

tools.description:
Validate all footnotes in document for coherence and compliance.
Returns detailed report on ID conflicts, orphaned content, missing styles, etc.
tools.name: validate_document_footnotes
tools.title: Validate Footnotes

tools.description:
Delete footnote with comprehensive cleanup and orphan removal.
Ensures complete removal from document.xml, footnotes.xml, and relationships.
tools.name: delete_footnote_robust
tools.title: Delete Footnote Robust

tools.description: Get text from a specific paragraph in a Word document.
tools.name: get_paragraph_text_from_document
tools.title: Get Paragraph Text

tools.description: Find occurrences of specific text in a Word document.
tools.name: find_text_in_document
tools.title: Find Text

tools.description: Convert a Word document to PDF format.
tools.name: convert_to_pdf
tools.title: Convert to PDF

tools.description: Reemplaza el bloque de párrafos debajo de un encabezado, evitando modificar TOC.
tools.name: replace_paragraph_block_below_header
tools.title: Replace Block Below Header

tools.description: Replace all content between start_anchor_text and end_anchor_text (or next logical header if not provided).
tools.name: replace_block_between_manual_anchors
tools.title: Replace Block Between Anchors

tools.title: Get All Comments

tools.name: get_comments_by_author

tools.title: Get Comments for Paragraph

tools.title: Set Table Width

tools.name: auto_fit_table_columns
tools.title: Auto-Fit Table Columns
